title: Seoul leads Asian stocks higher as US inflation eases rate fears
description: Asian stocks enjoyed a much-needed rally following a painful selloff in recent weeks as tech firms were battered by concerns over extended valuations and the vast sums invested in artificial intelligence.
content:
HONG KONG: Seoul led gains across Asian equity markets on Wednesday (Jul 15) as tech firms bounced back following a softer-than-expected US inflation print that soothed worries about a possible interest rate hike this month.
The mood was also lifted ... [3531 chars]

title: Meta employees sue, alleging AI-driven layoff picks hit workers on medical, parental leave
description: A group of 26 Meta employees has sued the company, claiming it used artificial intelligence systems to select people for layoffs, disproportionately targeting those on medical, parental or family leave.
content:
A group of 26 Meta employees has sued the company, claiming it used artificial intelligence systems to select people for layoffs, disproportionately targeting those on medical, parental or family leave.

title: Chipmaker CXMT eyes $9.8 bn in blockbuster China IPO
description: China's leading memory chipmaker ChangXin Memory Technologies is seeking billions in an IPO. This move aims to bolster the nation's artificial intelligence hardware capabilities. The company intends to rival global giants like Samsung and Micron. This significant offering marks China's largest mainland tech share sale ever. It will provide a strong foundation for China's AI development goals.

title: A tale of two Odysseys: Nolan's blockbuster gets AI-generated competition
description: It turns out Matt Damon is not the only Odysseus appearing on screen this summer. The makers of the controversial fully AI-generated film that debuted at Tribeca Festival last month are back — this time with an artificial-intelligence reimagining of Homer’s epic poem The Odyssey.

title: IBM faces worst stock crash in 58 years, loses $70 billion: Here's what led to the massive sell-off
description: The sharp downfall came after the company lowered its revenue outlook and admitted it had failed to keep pace with rapidly changing customer spending patterns in the era of Artificial Intelligence (AI).

description: CXMT, a linchpin in China’s drive to develop homegrown artificial intelligence technology, is aiming to raise nearly $10 billion in a blockbuster public offering in Shanghai.
content:

title: India turns to AI to improve healthcare access
description: In the second part of a series on India's artificial intelligence push, CNA looks at how hospitals are using AI to detect eye diseases and analyse medical scans, while doctors stress the technology remains a tool, not a replacement.
content:
MUMBAI: At the Shantilal Shanghvi Eye Institute in Mumbai, an eye scan using a smartphone could help save a patient's sight.
The hospital has incorporated artificial intelligence into its community outreach programme to identify patients from nearby ... [3069 chars]

title: US-China tech rivalry explained: Why the AI and chip war matters
description: The US and China are engaged in a significant technology competition. Artificial intelligence and semiconductor chips are central to this ongoing rivalry. Export controls are intensifying the AI chip war between these nations. Global supply chains are being reshaped by this intense technological race. Other countries face opportunities and challenges from this evolving competition.

title: ASML ups forecast, expands capacity on AI chip demand
description: ASML, the world's biggest supplier of equipment used to manufacture computer chips, has raised its financial forecasts for 2026 and said it would expand capacity after reporting better-than-expected second-quarter earnings, driven by artificial intelligence demand.
